spec_match.rationale: Uses SpeechRecognition with the Chrome 150 on-device contract: processLocally=true plus SpeechRecognition.available({ langs, processLocally: true }) pack preflight instead of the stale ondevice hint.

interactive.rationale: Includes an offline simulation toggle, an active mode switcher, a dynamic data flow chart, and real-time dictation streams.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly matches the index blurb detailing an offline-ready speech capture widget that contrasts local vs server-bound flows.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully reports missing SpeechRecognition, missing processLocally, unavailable pack preflight, simulated offline state, and recognition errors.

references.rationale: Correctly links to the external ChromeStatus feature page and standard Web Speech MDN documentation.

design_system.rationale: Utilizes showcase design variables, clean flex alignments, custom dot keyframe pulses, and contrast-friendly background panels.

openQuestions.title: Re-review repaired live probe in chrome-devtools-mcp
openQuestions.detail: The live probe or copyable feature-detection snippet was repaired on 2026-06-04. Re-run this route in chrome-devtools-mcp, exercise the visible controls, and verify the repaired probe output plus console/network state before marking the critique fully current.

openQuestions.title: Bind simulator state to actual navigator.onLine status
openQuestions.detail: The offline toggle currently only tracks a simulated boolean inside the page script. Automatically initializing or syncing this state with the actual browser window 'online'/'offline' events (and navigator.onLine) would make the offline test highly realistic and educational.

summary: 2026-06-04 maintenance replaced inaccurate live-probe logic with feature-specific checks; chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable in this session, so browser click-through re-review is still required.
